case_title: FREDDIE DE LEON VS. SUSAN LOMBARDI

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LEON, FREDDIE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LOMBARDI, SUSAN THE EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT PLAINTIFF'S CHIROPRACTIC TREATMENT WAS REASONABLY NECESSARY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY DE LEON, FREDDIE AS TO DEFENDANT LOMBARDI, SUSAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-2010 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2010 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-19-2010 BY PAUL SLAVIT. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LEON, FREDDIE AS TO DEFENDANT LOMBARDI, SUSAN
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-18-2010, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LOMBARDI, SUSAN
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-19-2010 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JUL-01-2011 ORDERED DESTROYED
